# Buzztm Full Brief

## Overview
Buzztm is a TikTok growth systems and launch execution partner for brands that need qualified demand instead of vanity reach.

Primary promise: Buzztm combines signal testing, UGC production, landing adaptation, and bilingual rollout into a tighter operator stack for brands that need revenue-facing TikTok work.

Commercial framing:
- The current public stack already includes Adacted and MMIX references.
- The new site structure makes room for service depth, articles, and future category expansion.
- The homepage now pushes project intake earlier instead of delaying it behind too much explanation.

## Primary package pages
### Signal Sprint
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/signal-sprint/?lang=en
Summary: Short-cycle validation for hooks, message-market fit, and landing promise before scaling spend.

### Launch Burst
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/launch-burst/?lang=en
Summary: Buzztm’s main format for creator production, paid launch execution, and recurring signal reviews.

### Multi-Geo Scale
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/multi-geo-scale/?lang=en
Summary: An extension layer for adapting the winning system across new geographies, languages, or customer segments.

### UGC Production for TikTok Ads
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/ugc-production-for-tiktok/?lang=en
Summary: Creator scripting, shot planning, editing, subtitles, and ad-ready delivery built for recurring paid testing.

### Creator Whitelisting and Seeding
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/creator-whitelisting-and-seeding/?lang=en
Summary: Source creators, structure whitelisting access, and turn seeded content into controlled paid distribution.

### TikTok Shop Launch Campaigns
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/tiktok-shop-launch-campaigns/?lang=en
Summary: Launch Shop-led product pushes with short-form commerce creative, creator coordination, and conversion-focused offer framing.

### Landing Page Localization
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/landing-page-localization/?lang=en
Summary: Adapt page copy, CTA sequence, proof framing, and buyer language so the click lands on a page built for the target market.

### TikTok Lead Generation Funnels
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/tiktok-lead-generation-funnels/?lang=en
Summary: Build short-form lead capture paths for consultations, demos, registrations, and high-intent inbound requests.

### Retargeting and Conversion Recovery
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/retargeting-and-conversion-recovery/?lang=en
Summary: Recover warm traffic with tighter retargeting sequences, remarketing creatives, and conversion-stage landing updates.

### TikTok Analytics and Attribution
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/tiktok-analytics-and-attribution/?lang=en
Summary: Build a cleaner reporting layer around traffic quality, lead intent, sales signal, and market-by-market rollout learning.

### TikTok Creative Strategy and Hook Testing
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/tiktok-creative-strategy-and-hook-testing/?lang=en
Summary: Shape the commercial angle, opening hook, proof sequence, and testing logic before production volume starts eating budget.

### TikTok Spark Ads Operations
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/tiktok-spark-ads-operations/?lang=en
Summary: Run Spark Ads setup, creator-asset amplification, audience structuring, and live optimization around commercial outcomes.

### Comment Seeding and Community Ops
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/services/comment-seeding-and-community-ops/?lang=en
Summary: Support launches with social proof in the comment layer, fast moderation logic, and community cues that improve buyer confidence.

## GEO launch pages
### TikTok agency support for UAE launches
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/geo/tiktok-agency-uae/?lang=en
Summary: This page exists for brands entering the UAE market that need TikTok creative, localized landing logic, and commercial launch sequencing without relying on generic social media management.

### TikTok agency support for Saudi Arabia campaigns
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/geo/tiktok-agency-saudi-arabia/?lang=en
Summary: Saudi-focused launches usually need stronger market framing, more deliberate proof, and cleaner conversion paths than broad social packages can provide.

### TikTok agency support for Germany launches
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/geo/tiktok-agency-germany/?lang=en
Summary: Germany-focused launch work usually needs clearer offer framing, stronger proof discipline, and a landing layer that feels commercially native rather than mechanically translated.

### TikTok agency support for Poland campaigns
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/geo/tiktok-agency-poland/?lang=en
Summary: Poland launch work often sits between regional expansion and localized lead generation, which makes message adaptation and page logic just as important as the creative itself.

### TikTok agency support for Kazakhstan launches
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/geo/tiktok-agency-kazakhstan/?lang=en
Summary: Kazakhstan launch work often rewards bilingual EN/RU execution, stronger landing alignment, and clear signal reading across creator, paid, and conversion layers.

### TikTok agency support for Romania launches
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/geo/tiktok-agency-romania/?lang=en
Summary: Romania launch work usually needs clearer offer sequencing, localized landing adaptation, and a stronger bridge between creator content and conversion logic.


## Articles
### How to test TikTok creative before you waste scale budget
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/blog/tiktok-creative-testing/?lang=en
Summary: Use a commercial filter before you scale production and media.

### Why TikTok landing systems fail after the click
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/blog/localized-landing-systems/?lang=en
Summary: The page usually breaks the promise the short-form ad just made.

### What a multi-geo TikTok rollout should look like
URL: https://www.buzztm.com/blog/multi-geo-launch-sequencing/?lang=en
Summary: Move from one proving ground to a repeatable expansion sequence.


## Contact and next step
Contact page: https://www.buzztm.com/contact/?lang=en
Recommended first action: use the contact page or review the services index to match the offer to the stage of launch.
